span.p:
Message fails in
Sub 1 or Sub 2

span.p:
Move to canary:dead_letter
XADD with original_msg_id,
original_stream, original_group,
dead_letter_reason

span.p:
JSON decode failed
in Sub 2 dispatch

span.p:
INSERT dead_letter_queue
event_id, merchant_id,
source, event_type,
payload, error_message,
retry_count=0,
next_retry_at=now()+5s

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
next_retry_at <= NOW()?
resolved_at IS NULL?
retry_count < 3?

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Event re-enters pipeline
Consumers process normally
DLQ entry stays for audit

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
resolved_at = NOW()
error_message +=
"max retries exceeded
(retry_count=3)"
next_retry_at = NULL

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Review dead_letter_reason
Check original payload
Identify root cause
